Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-01-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Plaintiff Janet Stanford, was present in pro per, placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants University of California, San Francisco, or Mark McBayne.
Defaults entered against defendants on January 9, 2008.
Doe defendant dismissed today, April 1, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, and after taking the matter under submission, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Janet Stanford, and against the Defaulted Defendants University of California, San Francisco, and Mark McBayne as follows:

Damages/Principal - $0.00.
Total - $0.00.

Judgment was prepared and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2008 Continued To Apr-25-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Feb-07-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
Plaintiff Janet Pickens, a/k/a Janet Stanford, was present in pro per, placed under oath and testified.
No apppearance by defendant University of California, San Francisco.
Default entered against defendant University of California, San Francisco - 10/12/07.
Plaintiff failed to serve statement of damages and reservation of right to seek punitive damages on defendant pursuant to CCP 425.11 & CCP 425.115, respectively.

Matter taken Off Calendar.
